name: OpenAnt
desc: OpenAnt from Knostic is the leading open source LLM-based vulnerability discovery product, helping defenders proactively find verified security flaws while min…
descFull: OpenAnt from Knostic is the leading open source LLM-based vulnerability discovery product, helping defenders proactively find verified security flaws while minimizing both false positives and false negatives. Stage 1 detects. Stage 2 attacks. What survives is real.
